description_long: This is a detailed diorama featuring a modern combat tactical vehicle, specifically an M1 Abrams main battle tank, displayed on a wooden base with a sandy terrain. The tank is painted in a desert tan color and is equipped with a large main cannon, multiple antennas, and additional armor plating along the sides and turret. Visible on the tank are several hatches, a mounted machine gun on the turret, and stowage racks. The scene also includes a military utility vehicle (Humvee) with open doors and a cargo bed, as well as several soldier figures positioned around the vehicles, suggesting an operational scenario. The tank's tracks and wheels are clearly visible, and the overall composition emphasizes a military patrol or checkpoint setting. The vehicles and figures are highly detailed, with realistic proportions and surface textures.
description: A desert-camouflaged M1 Abrams tank with reinforced armor and a Humvee, surrounded by soldier figures on a sandy display base. The vehicles feature detailed weapon mounts, antennas, and operational accessories.
description_view_0: The left side of the tank is visible, showing the side armor, tracks, and a soldier figure standing next to the vehicle.
description_view_1: The front of the tank and Humvee are visible, with the tank's main gun facing forward and soldiers positioned between the vehicles.
description_view_2: The right side of the tank and the Humvee's open side are visible, with a soldier standing near the Humvee's rear.
description_view_3: The rear of the tank and Humvee are visible, showing the back armor of the tank and the cargo area of the Humvee.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and a secondary machine gun mount near the commander's hatch.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with additional reinforced panels on the turret and sides; armor appears thick, sloped, and modular.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid desert tan color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White number '132' on the front and side of the tank; no other visible insignia or symbols.
attribute_tire_type: Tank uses continuous metal tracks; Humvee has four visible all-terrain tires with deep tread pattern.
